daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic today, Aries. There's a quiet confidence flowing through you that people are absolutely picking up on. Trust that magnetic pull—it's guiding you toward something real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person needs to hear something you've been holding back. Single? That spark you feel around someone specific? It's mutual energy. Act on it if it feels right.
daily.career: Today's all about showing up as your authentic self at work. Your fresh perspective on something is exactly what's needed. Don't dim it down—your take matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement today. Whether it's a walk, stretching, or dancing to your favorite song, honor that impulse. Your nervous system will thank you for the release.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating your vibe. Mercury's moving in your favor, bringing clarity to situations that felt foggy. Trust your gut instincts—they're basically your spiritual GPS right now. Time to manifest something real.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in the air for you. Old connections might resurface, but check in with yourself first about what you actually want. No settling this week—your standards are serving.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different right now. Don't sleep on that project or pitch that's been living rent-free in your head. Collaboration brings unexpected wins. Lead with authenticity and watch doors open.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentle movement and rest—listen to it. Whether that's yoga, walks, or literally just sleeping in, honor what feels nourishing. Your energy rebounds when you stop forcing it.
